message:
perf(http2,discover): O(1) HPACK static table lookup + dedup single-clone

Replace linear O(61) scans in find_static/find_static_name with
LazyLock HashMap lookups. Eliminate double-clone in dedup_preserve_order
by using reference-based HashSet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
